title: Blockade runner (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:BlockadeRunner-TCGEoD.jpg|thumb|right|250px|A [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] blockade runner]]
The term '''blockade runner''' referred to several [[Starship/Legends|starship]] classes:

*the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]
*the [[Foray-class blockade runner|''Foray''-class blockade runner]]
*the [[Pelta-class frigate/Legends|''Pelta''-class frigate]]
*the [[Rebel ship of the line]]

Several starships were categorized as '''blockade runners''':
*[[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing's]] [[Aurra Sing's blockade runner|blockade runner]]
*[[Chedaki]]'s [[Chedaki's blockade runner|blockade runner]]
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker's]] [[Luke Skywalker's scout craft|scout craft]]
*the ''[[Off Chance]]''

The term '''blockade runner''' also referred to [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] who worked [[Blockade/Legends|blockades]].

{{Disambig}}

|es=Burlador de bloqueos
}}
